content.full_text:
May 20, 2008

Heather Halsey
Staff Counsel
Dept. of Health Care Services
1501 Capitol Avenue, Suite 5001
Sacramento, CA 95899-7413

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-08-082

Dear Ms. Halsey:

We are in receipt of your May 20, 2008 letter regarding your position at the Department of Health Services. This correspondence is written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices Commission ("FPPC") has withdrawn your request for advice pursuant to your telephone call of the same date.

Should you have any further questions, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division

JWW:jgl
